new_value: {"notes":"Commit: e172bbe67\nUpdated random_range to use persistent AtomicU64 LCG state seeded with time+PID (per-node uniqueness). Calls within same ms now produce different jitter. Updated comments. Fixes thundering herd issue."}
Implemented stateful AtomicU64 LCG with time+PID seeding in random_range(). Ensures unique jitter even for calls in same ms or simultaneous node startup. Thundering herd prevention now effective.
